headline: FedEx to offer same-day delivery as it battles with Amazon, other retailers
summary: FedEx said it will give customers the option of two-hour or end-of-day delivery, including for large and oversized packages.

headline: Is FedEx Corporation (FDX) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is FDX a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on FedEx Corporation on r/AIPortfolios by manojs. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on FDX. FedEx Corporation’s share was trading at $358.85 as of March 20th. FDX’s trailing and forward P/E were 19.86 and 16.69 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. FedEx Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, […]

headline: FedEx Ramps Up Competition With Amazon for Same-Day Delivery. The Stock Rose.
summary: Consumers have an insatiable desire for faster delivery.  FedEx  is creating a solution to make that task a little more manageable.  On Tuesday, FedEx announced the rollout of “FedEx SameDay Local,” a service that will enable time-definite delivery windows across a national network.

headline: FedEx Leans Into Same Day And Healthcare Logistics As Valuation Lags
summary: FedEx (NYSE:FDX) has launched FedEx SameDay Local, a time-definite delivery service with real-time tracking, targeting fast, convenient shipments in local markets. The company has appointed a new healthcare focused vice president of quality to support its push into pharmaceuticals and other specialized logistics segments. These moves indicate a stronger focus on higher value, specialized shipping services alongside its existing global parcel and freight operations. For investors watching...

headline: Will Lawsuit Filers Fly to the Front of the Line for Tariff Refunds?
summary: Much remains unclear about the refund process for about $166 billion in tariff revenue collected under President Donald Trump’s now-defunct International Emergency Economic Powers Act duties.

headline: FedEx Unveils ‘SameDay Local’ Faster Delivery Service
summary: FedEx is teaming up with last-mile delivery provider OneRail to offer same-day delivery service, on the heels of Amazon’s recent launch of speedier delivery options.

headline: FedEx To Offer Faster Delivery with Launch of FedEx SameDay® Local
summary: MEMPHIS, Tenn., March 24, 2026--FedEx Corp. (NYSE: FDX) today announced the rollout of FedEx SameDay® Local, a delivery offering designed to enable its customers to meet rising consumer expectations for flexibility, control, and convenience while balancing their cost to serve.
